description_long: This is a rugged off-road SUV equipped for adventure, featuring a white body with visible dirt and wear, suggesting frequent use in challenging environments. The roof rack is loaded with a blue kayak and two large green storage containers, secured with blue straps. The rear of the vehicle carries a spare tire and a bright orange traction board, along with additional gear such as a jerry can and a shovel. The SUV has large, aggressive off-road tires with deep treads and green rims, and the windows are tinted for privacy. The front grille is robust, with a visible winch and protective bull bar, while the side mirrors are black and angular. The overall appearance is that of a well-prepared expedition vehicle, suitable for both urban and wilderness scenarios.
description: A white, dirt-marked off-road SUV with a roof rack carrying a kayak and storage boxes, plus rear-mounted gear and large off-road tires.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robust grille, winch, bull bar, and roof-mounted gear including a kayak and storage boxes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the SUV, the loaded roof rack, and the large off-road tires with green rims.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tire, orange traction board, jerry can, shovel, and the rear of the roof cargo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the kayak, storage boxes, and the SUV's rugged profile with visible dirt and off-road tires.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke green metallic rims with deep off-road tread tires
